title: Matinee Ladies
writer: C. Graham Baker, Sidney Buchman, Albert S. Howson
actors: May McAvoy, Malcolm McGregor, Hedda Hopper
plot: Short on money, law student Bob Ward takes a job as a "dancing companion" at a roadhouse, where most of his clients are women looking for a little excitement outside their marriages. He falls in love with Sallie Smith, a cigarette...
